ogTitle: Upper Growee vs Upper Horton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Growee and Upper Horton.
heading: Upper Growee vs Upper Horton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Growee, New South Wales and Upper Horton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Horton has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Upper Growee (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Growee or Upper Horton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Growee has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Upper Horton scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Growee scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Horton scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Growee or Upper Horton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Horton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
